{{Infobox character
| name = Nelula Seiren
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Planetary Governor of Visiria
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Nelula Seiren serves as the [[Planetary Governor]] of [[Visiria]]. A member of the [[Visiri]] species, she possesses pink skin and wears her hair in a complex style. Her appearance is distinguished by gold and [[ruby]] adornments on her neck, wrists, ears, and hair, as well as a glowing red third eye. In public, she maintains the persona of a beloved, grandmotherly figure. Politically, she represents [[Visiria]] as a significant part of the [[Karoshan Alliance]]. During her interactions with [[Raion]], she expressed pride in his actions and questioned the loyalty of those siding with traitors. She has also faced direct challenges to her authority, such as a challenge from the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Nelula Seiren serves as the [[Planetary Governor]] of [[Visiria]]. As an old woman, she possesses pale pink skin and hair styled into an elaborate nest. Her appearance is further distinguished by a third eye that emits a bright red glow. Additionally, her neck, wrists, ears, and hair shine with the luster of rubies and gold.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nelula Seiren]] is the [[Planetary Governor]] of [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nelula Seiren]] has pale pink skin and hair styled in an elaborate nest.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nelula Seiren]]'s hair, ears, neck, and wrists shine with gold and rubies.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nelula Seiren]] has a third eye that glows bright red.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Nelula Seiren]] is an old woman.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Do you want to challenge an old woman, then?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
